emotional_tone: calm, precise, slightly otherworldly, high-end neuro-tech instrument

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Minimalist HUD
layout_and_spacing.containers: p-8 or p-12 for inner breathing room. Glassmorphic containers must have subtle inner 1px borders.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Smooth fluid transitions between Context Map and Zen Frame (layoutId tracking)
motion_and_interactions.zen_pulse_normal: Breathing animation on box-shadow and border-color using cyan (#00F0FF) with 4s ease-in-out infinite
motion_and_interactions.zen_pulse_struggle: Breathing animation transitions to warm amber (#FF9500) indicating cognitive load
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Quick-Reference cards fade in with y-axis slight lift (-translate-y-1) and backdrop blur

zen_execution_frame.surface: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl
zen_execution_frame.pulse_border: Dynamic inset shadow and outer glow ring. Normal: shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.15)]. Struggle: shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,149,0,0.2)]

context_map.visualization: 3D topographical map using displacement maps. High peaks = bright cyan glow, low valleys = deep dark grey.
context_map.path_line: Glowing neon cyan tube geometry snaking through the terrain
context_map.camera: Top-down isometric angle, slowly rotating or following the 'Next Path'

socratic_sidekick.ghost_text: Absolute positioned in margins. text-zinc-600 font-mono text-sm. Appears as thought-nudges.
socratic_sidekick.hint_bridge: Floating popover card triggered by text selection/gesture. bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl p-4 rounded-xl

components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-session-btn')

images.description: Dark minimalist UI workspace background with subtle bioluminescent cyan glow
images.placement: Used as the underlying ambient background behind the Zen Execution Frame when not in 3D map mode.

images.description: 3D topographical map with glowing peaks and cyan path
images.placement: Visual reference or fallback texture for the Context Map dashboard.

images.description: Abstract 3D network nodes representing knowledge connections
images.placement: Decorative element for the Auth (Sign in/Sign up) side panel or onboarding screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure OLED Black (#000000) for the main body background to achieve the 'neuro-tech instrument' feel.
Implement the Zen Execution Frame using a centered, glassmorphic card (backdrop-blur-[20px], bg-black/40) over the ambient background.
The pulse timer around the Zen Frame MUST be animated (breathing effect) and must accept a state to switch from Cyan (#00F0FF) to Amber (#FF9500) based on struggle_score.
Build the Context Map using React Three Fiber. If raw 3D topography is too complex, use the provided '3d_visualization_reference' image layered with framer-motion interactive nodes.
Place Socratic Sidekick 'Ghost Text' in the left/right margins using fixed or absolute positioning with text-zinc-600.
Ensure the 'Next Action' button is the ONLY element using the high-intensity Glacial Cyan accent fully.
Avoid Inter font. Load 'Clash Display' for headings, 'Manrope' for body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers/HUD.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements.
Provide a smooth framer-motion layout transition between the 3D map view and the Zen Execution Frame.
